description: Have fun choosing from a collection of sneakers from gas. Comfy and stylish, this pair is worth adding in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and tees. Upper Synthetic upper structural comfort Padded tongue and collar with a central lace-up system for snug Fit and comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step cushioning Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Midsole Eva midsole for responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on the side for style Outsole Square lugs around the outsole for great grip Textured panel along the vertical length of the outsole across the centre for a great stride Embossed brand logo below the heel on the outsole doubling as a style statement and suction groove shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
